The '''Naboo Moon Mining Union''' was a [[Union (workers)|union]] of forty [[Starship/Legends|ships]] and crews that mined [[kassoti]] on [[Rori/Legends|Rori]] prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. They opposed [[Refugee Relief Movement/Legends|RRM]] ships from clogging ports on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], the union's chairperson was [[Kalzutan Opreka]].

{{Company-stub}}
